title: NS as the Universe Signature - Final Question

universe_runs_ns.description: Universe runs on fluid dynamics: plasma, gas, atmosphere, ocean, blood
universe_runs_ns.reason: Universe computes at EML-inf via NS; we prove at EML-finite

computation_gap.description: Universe runs computations that mathematics cannot verify; NS is proof
computation_gap.reason: The EML-finite/EML-inf gap IS the gap between what the universe computes and what we prove

ns_signature.description: NS is the universe signature: proof that something exists beyond the reach of any equation
ns_signature.reason: NS is not a problem to be solved; it is a certificate of EML-inf in physical reality
